briefdescription.para: Publisher for topic using sensor_msgs as interface.
Publisher for topic using ADI custom msg as interface.
Local node meant to catch node from main function to be used for ROS2 APIs.
IMU DIO output pin is treated as data ready.
Host processor DIO output pin acts as a Pulse Per Second (PPS) Input.
Pins which are directly connected from the host processor to the IMU using an ADG1611.
Pin for the buffer watermark interrupt signal.
Pin for the buffer overflow interrupt signal.
Pin for the error interrupt signal.
Counter for data received from Buffer Board.
Struct for scaled data from ADRD2121.
Struct for scaled IMU data from buf_burst_out_.
Boolean for first reading Needed when initializing before reading buffer data_raw.
Determine what operation mode will the node be running in.
Timeout for clearing the USB buffer, in milliseconds.
Configures the ADRD2121 based on parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Determine the msg_type the topic will be published on

briefdescription.para: An all-in-one function for reading the burst_data from the IMU, handle the data, and publish it to a topic.

parameterdescription.para: ROS Frame of data to be published
Determine the msg_type the topic will be published on

briefdescription.para: Starts capture of ADRD2121 Data Performs an initial read and discards it.

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Reverts the ADRD2121 to its factory settings.

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Clears FAULT status in Buffer Board.

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Saves current board configuration in flash memory, to be loaded in next bootup.

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Executes recovery operation to clear status back to 0000.

detaileddescription.para:
Will only be called if enable_init_recovery is TRUE
Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Initializes service servers based on operation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Determine if operation is STREAM or RECOVERY

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful
String of current status of Buffer Board.

briefdescription.para: Initializes service servers based on operation mode.

parameterdescription.para: Acquire value from param in AdiImuBufRos2

simplesect.para: Return if function call is successful

briefdescription.para: Checks if ADRD2121 device can be detected.

simplesect.para: Return bool if device is found
